stages.name: tilize_untilize
stages.description: Base data pipeline: reader reads RM sticks from DRAM into c_0, compute tilizes c_0->c_1 then untilizes c_1->c_16, writer writes RM sticks from c_16 to DRAM. Identity roundtrip that verifies the full reader->compute->writer chain with tilize/untilize bookends.

stages.name: centralize
stages.description: Add compute Phases 2+3: reduce_row mean (c_1->c_2 with 1/W scaler, WaitUpfrontNoPop) then sub_col (c_1,c_2->c_3, centralized=x-mean). Tilize and untilize still bracket the compute. Output is centralized values.

stages.name: full_standardize
stages.description: Add compute Phases 4-8: square centered (c_3->c_24, WaitUpfrontNoPop), reduce_row variance (c_24->c_4), add_scalar epsilon (c_4+c_7->c_25), rsqrt (c_25->c_5), mul_col (c_3*c_5->c_6). Complete row-wise standardization.
